- `RpcByrefDictionary` and `RpcCalleeListOps` should use wrappers for `GetKeys()` and `GetValues()`.

  - `RpcCalleeListOps` should return `RpcObjectReference` for `GetKeys` and `GetValues`.
- Create a a class `RpcLifecycleMock` (in RpcLifecycleMock.(h|cpp) and these files will be added to LibraryTest test project), inherits from `IRpcLifeCycle` but only implements `Register` and all 4 ops interfaces. Ops just do redirection like `RpcByvalLifecycleMock`, and `RpcByvalLifecycleMock` inherits from `RpcLifecycleMock`, spliltting it into two classes.
  - In unit test, now object ops should be offered (defined in TestLibraryRpcBycal.cpp) but everything needs to be `CHECK_FAIL(L"Not Supported!");`
